final:
module dram_cell (
    input wire clk,
    input wire we,
    input wire [3:0] din,
    output reg [3:0] dout
);
    reg [3:0] cell_data; // internal cell_data for the DRAM cell

    always @(posedge clk) begin
        if (we) begin
            cell_data <= din; // write data to cell_data
        end
    end

    always @(*) begin
        dout = cell_data; // output the stored data
    end
endmodule
